ai.welcome_msg: Hi! I'm Amy 💜 your AI parenting coach. Ask me anything — sleep, tantrums, picky eating, school worries. I'm here.

ai.subtitle: Hi 😊 I'm Amy — ask me anything about parenting, I'm here to help ❤️
ai.empty_heading: Hi 😊 I'm Amy, your parenting co-pilot
ai.empty_body: Don't worry, I'm here to help ❤️ Ask me about sleep, food, behavior, school anxiety, screen time — anything.
ai.suggested_q1: My child won't eat vegetables — what can I do?
ai.suggested_q2: How do I establish a better bedtime routine?
ai.suggested_q3: My 7-year-old is having tantrums — is this normal?
ai.suggested_q4: How can I encourage my child to read more?
ai.suggested_q5: What screen time is appropriate for a 5-year-old?
ai.suggested_q6: My child is anxious about going to school — how do I help?
ai.disclaimer: Amy AI · always consult a professional for medical concerns

landing.hero_headline: Raise Calmer, Smarter Kids — With Science, Not Guesswork
landing.hero_sub: AmyNest AI builds personalized, research-backed parenting plans in minutes — grounded in child psychology, not random tips.
landing.hero_free: ✨ Free to start · No credit card required
landing.problems_heading: Still figuring it out on your own?
landing.problems_sub: Every parent faces these. Amy Coach gives you a personalized, research-backed step-by-step plan — not generic tips.
landing.not_alone: You're not alone — 87% of AmyNest parents report calmer mornings within 2 weeks.
landing.features_heading: Tools Built on Real Child Science
landing.features_sub: One platform — every feature grounded in AAP guidelines, developmental psychology, and behavioral science.
landing.coach_title: Amy Coach — Solve Real Parenting Challenges
landing.coach_desc: From tantrums to screen time, sleep to focus — Amy Coach gives you deep, personalized 12-step plans grounded in Dr. Ross Greene's CPS model, Dr. Carol Dweck's growth mindset framework, and AAP guidelines. No generic advice. Only what works for your child.
landing.highlight_1: Personalized plans based on your child's profile
landing.feature_routine_desc: Structured, personalized routines that wire your child's brain for consistency — based on habit loop theory.
landing.feature_hub_desc: Expert articles, daily tips, and Amy AI guidance — curated from leading child development research.
landing.feature_ai_desc: Ask anything, get a research-grounded answer instantly. Like having a child psychologist in your pocket.
landing.mid_cta: Try Amy Coach free — your first personalized plan in under 3 minutes.
landing.how_eyebrow: Get Your First Plan in Minutes
landing.how_sub: Three steps to a science-backed plan personalized for your child.
landing.step1_desc: Pick the parenting problem you want to solve — tantrums, sleep, screen time, focus, and more.
landing.step2_desc: Age, personality, and habits — Amy uses this to calibrate a plan to your child's specific profile.
landing.step3_desc: Receive a 12-step, science-backed plan you can start today — built on proven behavioral frameworks.
landing.trust_sub: AmyNest is built on 30+ peer-reviewed frameworks — not opinions. Real science, real results.
landing.trust1_desc: Every routine is designed around Cue → Routine → Reward. Children build lasting habits — not just temporary behavior changes that fade in a week.
landing.trust2_desc: Amy rewards effort over outcome — proven by Stanford research to build resilience, curiosity, and long-term success in children.
landing.trust3_desc: Screen time, sleep schedules, and developmental milestones — all calibrated to American Academy of Pediatrics and CDC guidelines.
landing.final_cta_heading: Your child deserves a plan that actually works.
landing.final_cta_sub: Join 12,000+ families using research-backed parenting plans to raise calmer, smarter, more confident kids — completely free.
